---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
# ============================================================
#  Fast Food & Health in America — Shiny Dashboard
#  app.R  (single-file entry point; sources modular R files)
# ============================================================
 
library(shiny)
library(bslib)          # modern Bootstrap 5 theming
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
 
# Source modular helpers
source("R/data_load.R")
source("R/ui_components.R")
source("R/server_chains.R")
source("R/server_nutrition.R")
source("R/server_obesity.R")
source("R/server_race.R")
source("R/server_map.R")
 
# ── Load data once at startup ────────────────────────────────
dat <- load_all_data()
 
# ── Theme ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
app_theme <- bs_theme(
  version       = 5,
  bg            = "#faf7f2",
  fg            = "#2d2520",
  primary       = "#d4380d",
  secondary     = "#8c7355",
  success       = "#27ae60",
  info          = "#2980b9",
  warning       = "#e67e22",
  danger        = "#c0392b",
  base_font     = font_google("DM Sans"),
  heading_font  = font_google("DM Serif Display"),
  code_font     = font_google("Space Mono"),
  "navbar-bg"   = "#1a1612",
  "navbar-light-color" = "#f0ede6",
  "card-border-color"  = "#ede8df",
  "card-bg"            = "#ffffff",
  "body-bg"            = "#faf7f2"
)
 
# ── UI ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ui <- page_navbar(
  title = tags$span(
    tags$span("Fast Food", style = "font-family:'DM Serif Display';"),
    tags$em(" & ", style = "color:#e67e22; font-style:italic;"),
    tags$span("Health", style = "font-family:'DM Serif Display';")
  ),
  theme    = app_theme,
  bg       = "#1a1612",
  fillable = TRUE,
  id       = "main_nav",
 
  # Custom CSS
  header = tags$head(
    tags$link(rel = "stylesheet",
      href = "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;700&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap"),
    tags$style(HTML(app_css()))
  ),
 
  # ── Hero panel ───────────────────────────────────────────
  nav_panel(
    title = "Overview",
    icon  = icon("chart-bar"),
    hero_ui("hero", dat)
  ),
 
  # ── Chains ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  nav_panel(
    title = "Chains",
    icon  = icon("store"),
    chains_ui("chains")
  ),
 
  # ── Nutrition ────────────────────────────────────────────
  nav_panel(
    title = "Nutrition",
    icon  = icon("apple-alt"),
    nutrition_ui("nutrition")
  ),
 
  # ── Obesity ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  nav_panel(
    title = "Obesity",
    icon  = icon("heartbeat"),
    obesity_ui("obesity")
  ),
 
  # ── Race / Demographics ──────────────────────────────────
  nav_panel(
    title = "Demographics",
    icon  = icon("users"),
    race_ui("race")
  ),
 
  # ── Interactive Map ──────────────────────────────────────
  nav_panel(
    title = "Map",
    icon  = icon("map-marked-alt"),
    map_ui("map")
  ),
 
  # ── Data Explorer ────────────────────────────────────────
  nav_panel(
    title = "Data",
    icon  = icon("table"),
    data_explorer_ui("data_exp", dat)
  ),
 
  nav_spacer(),
  nav_item(
    tags$a(
      icon("github"), " GitHub",
      href   = "https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/fastfood-health-dashboard",
      target = "_blank",
      class  = "btn btn-sm btn-outline-light me-2"
    )
  )
)
 
# ── Server ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
server <- function(input, output, session) {
 
  chains_server("chains",      dat)
  nutrition_server("nutrition", dat)
  obesity_server("obesity",    dat)
  race_server("race",          dat)
  map_server("map",            dat)
  data_explorer_server("data_exp", dat)
 
  # Hero KPI boxes
  output$hero_kpi_chains    <- renderText(nrow(dat$chains))
  output$hero_kpi_locations <- renderText(format(nrow(dat$locations), big.mark = ","))
  output$hero_kpi_items     <- renderText(format(nrow(dat$nutrition), big.mark = ","))
  output$hero_kpi_states    <- renderText(n_distinct(dat$obesity$NAME))
}
 
shinyApp(ui, server)
 
```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
